title: Add Nox-based pckg unit test workflow

source.subject: ci: add Nox-based unit test workflow and noxfile

body:
Adds **Nox**-based unit test workflow and `noxfile` to the pckg repository.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`86f3cb7`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/86f3cb7)
- **Subject:** ci: add Nox-based unit test workflow and noxfile
- **Completed:** 2026-04-13

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`

## Relation
Aligns pckg CI with superrepo/compiler Nox migration.
